page.title: Website Redesign and Migration to Next.js | WordPress → Next.js
page.description: Professional redesign and migration of websites from WordPress, Wix, Joomla, and other platforms to Next.js. Improve performance, SEO, and user experience. Faster loading, better security, and modern features.

hero.title: Website Redesign and Migration
hero.subtitle: Modernize your website from WordPress, Wix, Joomla, or other platforms to Next.js. We transform outdated websites into fast, modern, SEO-optimized web applications. Increase performance up to 10x and give your users a top-tier experience.

intro.title: Why Is It Time to Redesign and Migrate Your Website?
intro.content: In a fast-evolving digital world, a website built a few years ago may no longer meet modern standards. WordPress, Wix, Joomla, and similar platforms were a great choice in the past, but today there are more advanced technologies offering incomparably better performance, security, and user experience.

oldPlatforms.title: Problems with Old Platforms
oldPlatforms.item4: An outdated design that doesn't follow modern trends
oldPlatforms.item6: Expensive maintenance and recurring plugin costs

nextjsBenefits.title: Benefits of Migrating to Next.js
nextjsBenefits.item2: A perfectly responsive design for every device
nextjsBenefits.item4: A modern design with the latest UI/UX trends
nextjsBenefits.item5: Great SEO and a higher position in Google results

benefits.title: Key Benefits of Migrating to Next.js

items.title: Unmatched Performance
items.description: Next.js uses cutting-edge technologies such as Server-Side Rendering (SSR), Static Site Generation (SSG), and Incremental Static Regeneration (ISR). This means your website loads at lightning speed, which directly impacts user satisfaction and conversion rate. Studies show that as many as 40% of users leave a website if it doesn't load within 3 seconds - with Next.js, your website loads in under a second.

items.title: Superior SEO and Visibility
items.description: Google ranks fast websites higher in search results. Next.js enables server-side rendering, meaning search engines can index your content immediately, unlike traditional Single Page Applications. Automatic optimization of images, meta tags, and structured data ensures your website gets maximum visibility. Clients who migrate to Next.js see an average 30-50% increase in organic traffic.

items.title: A Perfect Mobile Experience
items.description: More than 60% of internet traffic comes from mobile devices. Next.js delivers a perfectly responsive design that automatically adapts to every screen size. Progressive Web App (PWA) features let your website work even offline, send push notifications, and provide an experience that rivals native apps. A Google Core Web Vitals score of 90+ guaranteed.

items.title: Significant Cost Savings
items.description: Eliminate the monthly cost of expensive WordPress plugins, themes, and add-ons. Clients save an average of €200-500 a year after migration.

items.title: Maximum Security
items.description: WordPress websites are a frequent target for hackers due to their popularity and numerous plugin vulnerabilities. Next.js applications are significantly more secure because they don't rely on a traditional database setup and have no admin panel that can be hacked. No need for constant plugin updates or worrying about security patches. Built-in protection against XSS, CSRF, and SQL injection attacks. Automatic HTTPS and security best practices out of the box.

items.title: Better Conversion and Engagement
items.description: A faster website means happier users and more conversions. Every 100ms reduction in load time results in a 1% increase in conversions. Modern animation and interactions create a memorable user experience. Real-time features, content personalization, and fast navigation between pages keep users engaged. Analytics show Next.js websites have a 25-40% lower bounce rate than traditional platforms.

whyNextJS.title: Why Next.js Specifically?
whyNextJS.subtitle: Next.js is the advanced React framework used by global giants such as Netflix, Nike, Twitch, TikTok, Uber, and Hulu

features.title: Modern Technology
features.description1: Next.js is built on React, the world's most popular JavaScript library. It uses the latest web standards and industry best practices. Unlike WordPress, which is built on 30-year-old PHP technology, Next.js represents the future of web development.
features.description2: Automatic code splitting means users only download the code they need for the current page, drastically reducing load time. Image optimization automatically compresses and serves images in modern formats like WebP.

features.title: Flexibility and Scalability
features.description1: Next.js gives you full control over every aspect of your website. It isn't limited by themes and plugins the way WordPress is. You can implement any feature you can think of, from simple landing pages to complex web applications.
features.description2: As your business grows, your website scales easily. Whether you have 100 or 10 million visitors a month, a Next.js website will run flawlessly. Automatic scaling on platforms like Vercel ensures you never lose visitors due to server downtime.

features.title: Incredible Performance
features.description1: Next.js uses a hybrid approach that combines Static Site Generation (SSG) and Server-Side Rendering (SSR). Static pages are generated during the build process and served at lightning speed from a CDN around the world.
features.description2: Prefetching technology automatically loads links visible on screen, so navigation between pages feels instant. Lazy loading ensures resources are only loaded when needed. The result? A Google PageSpeed Score of 95-100.

features.title: Global Availability
features.description1: Your website will be available to users around the world at incredible speed, thanks to Edge Network technology. Content is automatically distributed across hundreds of servers worldwide and served from the server closest to each visitor.
features.description2: Internationalization (i18n) is built into Next.js, meaning you can easily create multi-language websites. Automatic language detection, SEO-friendly URLs for every language, and optimization for local markets.

cta.title: Join Thousands of Companies That Have Migrated to Next.js

steps.title: Analysis and Assessment
steps.description: We thoroughly analyze your current website - content, design, features, and SEO metrics.

steps.title: Content Export and Backup
steps.description: We create a complete backup of your website and export all content - text, images, video, and the database.

steps.title: Design and Prototype
steps.description: We create a modern design that respects your brand while using the latest UI/UX trends.

steps.title: Development and Migration
steps.description: We build the website in Next.js, implement every feature, and migrate the content.

steps.title: Testing and Optimization
steps.description: We thoroughly test the website across every device and browser. We optimize performance for a maximum PageSpeed score.

steps.title: Launch and Go-Live
steps.description: We deploy the website to a production server. We configure DNS and the custom domain. We monitor performance 24/7.

guarantee.title: Zero Downtime Guarantee
guarantee.description: Your current website remains fully functional throughout the entire migration. The switch to the new website happens instantly, with no interruption to your operations.

cta.text: Every aspect is measured and documented. We offer a before/after analysis of your website.

items.question: How long does the migration process take?
items.answer: It depends on the size and complexity of the website. A small website (5-10 pages) can be migrated in 2-3 weeks. A medium website (20-50 pages) usually takes 4-6 weeks. A large website or e-commerce platform can take 8-12 weeks. We give you an exact timeline after the initial analysis.

items.question: Will my website be unavailable during migration?
items.answer: No! Your current website remains fully functional throughout the entire process. We build the new website on a staging server and test it thoroughly before launch. The switch from the old to the new website happens instantly, usually taking just a few minutes for DNS propagation.

items.question: What happens to my SEO ranking?
items.answer: SEO is our priority! We implement 301 redirects for every old URL, preserve all meta tags and structured data, and optimize technical SEO. In most cases, clients see improved SEO rankings after migration thanks to better performance and Core Web Vitals. We offer 90 days of SEO monitoring after launch.

items.question: Can I keep my current design?
items.answer: Absolutely! You can choose between three options: (1) Identical transfer - we keep the current design pixel-perfect, (2) Refresh - we keep the structure but modernize the elements, or (3) Complete redesign - we create a brand-new modern design. Most clients choose option 2 for the best balance.

items.question: How much does migration cost?
items.answer: The price depends on the scope of work. A small website starts at €1,500, a medium website €3,000-€6,000, and large, complex projects or e-commerce can be €8,000+. We offer a free estimate after analyzing your website. Payment is split across several stages (deposit, milestones, final payment).

items.question: Can I update the website after migration?
items.answer: Yes! We can integrate a headless CMS such as Sanity, Contentful, or Strapi, which lets you easily update content just like in WordPress. Alternatively, we offer maintenance packages where we handle updates for you. We also provide video tutorials and documentation.

items.question: What happens to images and video files?
items.answer: All media is migrated and automatically optimized. The Next.js Image component automatically compresses images, generates responsive versions, and serves them in modern formats (WebP, AVIF). Video files can be hosted on your own server or migrated to cloud storage (Cloudinary, AWS S3) for better performance.

items.question: Do I keep control of my domain?
items.answer: Completely! You retain ownership of the domain. We simply update the DNS records to point to the new server. You can use any domain registrar (GoDaddy, Namecheap, Cloudflare, etc.). We'll help you with DNS configuration and the SSL certificate.

items.question: What if I find a bug after launch?
items.answer: We offer 30 days of free post-launch support. Any bugs or issues that arise during this period will be fixed at no extra cost. After that, you can choose between hourly support or a monthly maintenance package.

items.question: Can I keep my blog and existing posts?
items.answer: Of course! All blog posts, categories, tags, and comments will be migrated. We can integrate a CMS for easy future blog posts, or implement a Markdown-based blog system. The URL structure can stay the same for SEO purposes (/blog/post-name) or be optimized.

items.question: Will my forms and integrations still work?
items.answer: Yes! We migrate all contact forms, newsletter signup forms, payment integrations, CRM connections (HubSpot, Salesforce), email marketing (Mailchimp), analytics (Google Analytics, Meta Pixel), and every other third-party service you use.
